title: Verpine prototype shield
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:VerpineShield.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Canderous Ordo]] protected by a Verpine prototype shield]]
A '''[[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] prototype shield''' was an experimental forearm-mounted [[Personal energy shield/Legends|personal shield]] generator in use around the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Though the Verpine are often credited with the design the unit was, in essence, nothing more than an upgraded [[Arkanian energy shield|Arkanian shield]]. Like its technological cousin, the Verpine shield protected its wearer from temperature extremes as well as sonic- and energy-based weapons.

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
